description: About DN Solutions and HELLER Since its founding in 1976, DN Solutions has established itself as a leading global machine tool company, ranking as the world’s third-largest machine tool brand by revenue. By recently acquiring HELLER—a historic German manufacturer founded in Nürtingen in 1894—the company has significantly expanded its technological footprint and global manufacturing capabilities. The integrated product portfolio now encompasses more than 400 product types. This includes DN Solutions' highly successful DNT, DNM, SMX, and DVF lines, renowned for their durability, precision, and rigidity, seamlessly complemented by HELLER’s state-of-the-art 4-axis and 5-axis machining centres, dynamic mill-turn centres, and special-purpose machines designed for highly productive series manufacturing. Operating as a unified multinational force, the company meets the diverse and complex needs of customers across the automotive, aerospace, medical technology, energy, and semiconductor sectors. With HELLER’s four production facilities across Europe, Asia, and the Americas, alongside DN Solutions’ robust network of over 140 dealers in 66 countries, the combined group guarantees dependable supply and localized expertise in all key markets. Driven by a shared vision for the future, DN Solutions and HELLER provide not only high-end physical machining solutions but also advanced digital manufacturing platforms like CUFOS, modular services, and highly productive automation systems, paving the way toward the future of intelligent production.

description: SEACAD was founded in 1998 as a value added reseller of SOLIDWORKS. Started with a small office setup, today is a brand name that is highly recognized and respected in the industry, earning a reputation for delivering productivity and proven results to Singapore’s leading MNC and SME design and manufacturing firms. Over the last 20 years, we have carefully expanded our SOLIDWORKS and Partner Products portfolio, including overseas expansion to countries such as Vietnam and Indonesia. SEACAD has established two subsidiary companies, SEACAD TECHNOLOGIES VIETNAM COMPANY LIMITED and PT SEACAD Technologies Indonesia. Today, SEACAD's customers are provided with the most comprehensive and fully integrated solutions. With our experience and expertise, we are able to ensure the products we provide meet and exceed customer expectations. Our SOLIDWORKS and Partner Solutions encompass a wide range of Engineering disciplines, including 3D Mechanical and Electrical & Electronic Design, Piping, Finite Element Analysis, CNC Manufacturing, Additive Manufacturing, Documentation, Data Management, and many more.

description: KAIAN (VIETNAM) NEW MATERIALS Co., Ltd. is the Vietnamese subsidiary of Jiangxi Kaian New Materials Group Co., Ltd. , a leading manufacturer of copper and copper alloy products in China. As the Group's strategic presence in Southeast Asia, KSPARK Vietnam focuses on the import, distribution, and trading of high-quality non-ferrous metal materials, serving customers across Vietnam and neighboring markets. Supported by the advanced manufacturing capabilities of our parent company, we specialize in the supply of: • Copper Strip • Copper Busbar • Brass Wire • Brass Alloy Electrode Wire • Copper and Brass Semi-Finished Products • Other Non-Ferrous Metal Materials Our products are widely used in electrical equipment, power transmission and distribution systems, electronics, automotive components, hardware manufacturing, precision machining, and industrial applications. With direct access to the Group's production resources, we provide customers with stable quality, competitive pricing, flexible supply solutions, and reliable delivery schedules. Our integrated supply chain enables us to respond efficiently to the diverse requirements of manufacturers, distributors, and project contractors throughout the region. At KAIAN Vietnam, we are committed to building long-term partnerships through professional service, technical support, and consistent product performance. By connecting world-class manufacturing capabilities with local market needs, we strive to be a trusted supplier of copper and non-ferrous metal materials in Southeast Asia.

description: Rettificatrici Ghiringhelli SpA established in 1921 are based in the North of Italy on Lake Maggiore. For more than 80 years RETTIFICATRICI GHIRINGHELLI S.p.A. have developed a range of high-tech centreless grinding machines which find applications in various fields of manufacturing i.e. automotive, bearings, electric motors, aerospace, household appliances, hydraulics, tools, medical, textile. Ghiringhelli centreless grinding machines are CNC controlled and are capable of being utilized as standalone units or linked into automatic lines. They are equipped with specific tooling according to customers’ requirements and are suitable for plunge grinding multi diameter components or through feed grinding of plain cylindrical components. For years committed to act according to the ESG Environmental Social and Governance principles of sustainability, Rettificatrici Ghiringhelli has adopted several solutions to improve the production efficiency of its centreless grinding machines and optimize the use of raw materials and resources with particular attention to the Circular Economy too.

description: Festo is a global player and an independent family-owned company with headquarters in Esslingen am Neckar, Germany. Festo has set standards in industrial automation technology and technical education ever since its establishment, thereby making a contribution to sustainable development of the environment, the economy and society. The company supplies pneumatic and electrical automation technology to 300,000 customers of factory and process automation in over 35 industries. The LifeTech sector with medical technology and laboratory automation is becoming increasingly important. The products and services are available in 176 countries. With about 20,700 employees in over 250 branch offices in 61 countries worldwide, Festo achieved a turnover of around €3.36 billion in 2021. Each year around 7% of this turnover is invested in research and development. In this learning company, 1.5 % of turnover is invested in basic and further training. Festo Didactic SE is a leading provider of technical education and training and offers its customers worldwide comprehensive digital and physical learning solutions in the industrial environment.

description: Oriental Motor Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd. is a leading provider of motion control solutions, offering a wide range of precision motors, actuators, and automation systems for industrial applications. As part of a global network with over 130 years of expertise, the company supports industries such as semiconductor, medical, electronics and factory automation with high-quality products, fast delivery, and tailored engineering solutions to meet diverse motion needs. With a strong presence in the Asia Pacific region, the company delivers comprehensive support from product selection to after-sales service. Its portfolio includes stepper motors, servo motors, brushless motors, and integrated motion systems designed for reliability, ease of use, and energy efficiency. By combining innovation with practical application expertise, Oriental Motor helps customers improve productivity and optimize machine performance across various industries.

description: UNION Brush - Eang Lian Corporation, was established in 1985 as an experienced manufacturer, specializing in full range of industrial brushes in Taiwan. With own brand, UNION Brush is widely recognized and trusted by distributing around the world. UNION provide full range industrial brushes for your special applications. Our popular product range covers power brush and strip brush, roller brush and non-woven FM rolls, super finishing and precision brush, deburring and grinding brush, sanding brush and anti-static conductive brush, professional HTA brush and professional honing brush... Idea used for cleaning, brushing, grinding, deburring, polishing and drilling. Our brushes are designed feasible for several applications and equipment. For instance, air and electric grinders, portable grinders, power or air tool, hand tool, sander, band saw sharpener, large roller brush for washing and oiling, PCB brushes for electrics industry, anti-static brush for IC function test in semiconductor industry, surface cleaning after acid pickling for steel industry, aluminum and aluminum-magnesium alloy deburring. All kinds of professional brushes are available for CUSTOM-MADE.

description: Yaw Sheng Machinery Industrial Co., Ltd. | Professional Manufacturer of Shot Blasting & Surface Treatment Equipment Founded in 1976, Yaw Sheng Machinery Industrial Co., Ltd. has over 40 years of experience in the surface treatment equipment industry. We are a leading Taiwanese manufacturer specializing in sand blasting machines (shot blasting machines, shot cleaning machines), blasting rooms, and automated surface treatment systems. Adhering to our core philosophy of “Quality First, Customer Foremost,” we are committed to continuous equipment R&D, process optimization, and technological innovation. Over the years, we have evolved from a single equipment supplier into a comprehensive provider of integrated surface treatment solutions, serving a wide range of industries both domestically and internationally. Products & Equipment We offer a diverse range of surface treatment equipment, all of which can be customized based on production capacity and workpiece requirements: Sand Blasting Machines Shot Blasting Machines Blasting Room Turnkey Solutions Conveyor-Type Automated Surface Treatment Systems Customized Special-Purpose Equipment Design & Manufacturing From standalone machines to complete plant planning, we provide total solutions to meet various industrial process needs. Customization & System Integration Capability Our experienced R&D team provides tailored solutions based on: Workpiece size and weight Production cycle time and capacity requirements Surface treatment quality expectations On-site space and workflow planning We deliver optimized equipment configurations and integrated systems to help customers enhance automation and overall production efficiency. Brand Philosophy Guided by our brand vision as a “Benchmark in the Surface Treatment Industry,” Yaw Sheng Machinery continues to advance technology, enhance quality, and strives to become a trusted global partner in the surface treatment equipment industry.

description: For 100 years, GROB has been a pioneer in the development and manufacture of highly innovative production and automation systems in the field of machining and electromobility. Our customers include the world's most renowned automotive manufacturers, their suppliers and many other well-known companies from various industries. The portfolio ranges from universal machining centers to highly complex manufacturing systems with their own automation solutions to fully automated assembly lines. In addition, the product range includes production systems for electric motors and assembly lines for battery technology (cell, module, pack). From Bavaria into the wider world: As a global, family-managed company, we have been developing manufacturing systems and machine tools since being established in Munich in 1926 and are still on a growth course. Our customers include the world's leading automotive manufacturers, their component suppliers and other renowned companies from diverse sectors. We invariably guarantee the best possible quality through our production facilities in Germany, Brazil, China, USA and Italy, as well as our worldwide service centers and sales branches.
